name: Copy as HTML
description: Allows you to copy text with HTML (rich text) formatting from the markdown editor (including images). Also allows you to copy as plain text (without markdown formatting)
author: bwat47

embedImages.label: Embed images as base64
embedImages.description: If enabled, images in selection will be embedded as base64 in HTML output.

exportFullHtml.label: Export as full HTML document
exportFullHtml.description: If enabled, exported HTML will be a full document with your custom stylesheet (copy-as-html-user.css in your profile folder).

downloadRemoteImages.label: Download and embed remote images
downloadRemoteImages.description: If enabled (along with Embed images as base64), remote HTTP/HTTPS images will be downloaded and embedded as base64. If un-checked, the resulting document may contain links to external resources.

embedSvgAsPng.label: Convert SVG images to PNG
embedSvgAsPng.description: If enabled, embedded SVG images will be rasterized as PNG to improve compatibility with applications that cannot display inline SVG.

preserveSuperscript.label: Preserve superscript markers
preserveSuperscript.description: If enabled, superscript markers will be preserved in plain text output.

preserveSubscript.label: Preserve subscript markers
preserveSubscript.description: If enabled, subscript markers will be preserved in plain text output.

preserveEmphasis.label: Preserve emphasis markers
preserveEmphasis.description: If enabled, emphasis markers will be preserved in plain text output.

preserveBold.label: Preserve bold markers
preserveBold.description: If enabled, bold markers will be preserved in plain text output.

preserveHeading.label: Preserve heading markers
preserveHeading.description: If enabled, heading markers will be preserved in plain text output.

preserveStrikethrough.label: Preserve strikethrough markers
preserveStrikethrough.description: If enabled, strikethrough markers will be preserved in plain text output.

preserveHorizontalRule.label: Preserve horizontal rules
preserveHorizontalRule.description: If enabled, horizontal rules will be preserved in plain text output.

preserveMark.label: Preserve highlight markers
preserveMark.description: If enabled, highlight markers will be preserved in plain text output.

preserveInsert.label: Preserve insert markers
preserveInsert.description: If enabled, insert markers will be preserved in plain text output.

preserveCodeBackticks.label: Preserve code backticks
preserveCodeBackticks.description: If enabled, inline code and code block backticks will be preserved in plain text output.

hyperlinkBehavior.label: Plain text hyperlink behavior
hyperlinkBehavior.description: How external HTTP/HTTPS links should appear in plain text output.

indentType.label: List indentation type
indentType.description: How nested lists should be indented in plain text output.

listSpacing.label: List spacing
listSpacing.description: Whether plain text lists should include blank lines between list items.

displayEmojis.label: Display emojis
displayEmojis.description: If enabled, emojis will be displayed in the plain text output.

preserveTablePipes.label: Preserve table pipes
preserveTablePipes.description: If enabled, markdown pipe separators will be preserved in plain text output.
